channel.title: WatchGuard Technologies, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by WatchGuard Technologies, Inc. (watchguard).

item.title: CVE-2026-6788 · 8.5 HIGH — Uncontrolled search path in PluginLauncher allows SYSTEM code execution in WatchGuard Agent
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in WatchGuard Agent on Windows allows Using Malicious Files.This issue affects WatchGuard Agent before 1.25.03.0000.

item.title: CVE-2026-6787 · 8.5 HIGH — Usage of a hard-coded cryptographic key in WatchGuard Agent allows inclusion of code into existing process
item.description: Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key vulnerability in WatchGuard Agent on Windows allows Inclusion of Code in Existing Process.This issue affects WatchGuard Agent: before 1.25.03.0000.

item.title: CVE-2026-41286 · 7.1 HIGH — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in WatchGuard Agent Discovery Service on Windows Causes Denial of Service - Variant B
item.description: Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in the WatchGuard Agent discovery service on Windows allows Overflow Buffers. An unauthenticated attacker on the same local network could exploit this vulnerability to crash the agent service.

item.title: CVE-2026-41288 · 7.3 HIGH — WatchGuard Agent on Windows Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect permission assignment for a resource in the patch management component of the WatchGuard Agent on Windows allows an authenticated local user to elevate their privileges to NT AUTHORITY\\SYSTEM.

item.title: CVE-2026-41287 · 7.1 HIGH — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in WatchGuard Agent Discovery Service on Windows Causes Denial of Service - Variant A
item.description: Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in the WatchGuard Agent discovery service on Windows allows Overflow Buffers. An unauthenticated attacker on the same local network could exploit this vulnerability to crash the agent service.

item.title: CVE-2026-3987 · 8.6 HIGH — WatchGuard Firebox Arbitrary File Write vis Path Traversal in Fireware Web UI
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability in the Fireware OS Web UI on WatchGuard Firebox systems may allow a privileged authenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary code in the context of an elevated system process.This issue affects Fireware OS 12.6.1 u…

item.title: CVE-2026-4315 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in Fireware Web UI
item.description: A Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in the WatchGuard Fireware OS WebUI could allow a remote attacker to trigger a denial-of-service (DoS) condition in the Fireware Web UI by convincing an authenticated administrator into visiting a mal…

item.title: CVE-2026-4266 · 8.4 HIGH — WatchGuard Firebox Insecure Deserialization in Fireware Access Portal
item.description: An Insecure Deserialization vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS allows an attacker that has obtained write access to the local filesystem through another vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the portald user.This issue affect…

item.title: CVE-2026-3344 · 6.9 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox System Integrity Check Bypass
item.description: A vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow an attacker to bypass the Fireware OS filesystem integrity check and maintain limited persistence via a maliciously-crafted firmware update package.This issue affects Fireware OS 12.0 up to and incl…

item.title: CVE-2026-3343 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox Reflected Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Fireware Web UI
item.description: A reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Fireware OS Web UI enabled execution of malicious JavaScript in the context of an authenticated management user's browser when they click on a specially crafted link. This vulnerability affe…

item.title: CVE-2026-3342 · 8.6 HIGH — WatchGuard Firebox Out of Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow an authenticated privileged administrator to execute arbitrary code with root permissions via an exposed management interface. This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 11.9 up to…

item.title: CVE-2026-1498 · 7 HIGH 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox LDAP Injection
item.description: An LDAP Injection vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to retrieve sensitive information from a connected LDAP authentication server through an exposed authentication or management web interface. This vu…

item.title: CVE-2025-14733 · 9.3 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox iked Out of Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code. This vulnerability affects both the Mobile User VPN with IKEv2 and the Branch Office VPN using IKEv2 when configured…

item.title: CVE-2025-1547 · 7.5 HIGH — WatchGuard Firebox Authenticated Stack Overflow in Certificate Request Command
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability [CWE-121] in WatchGuard Fireware OS's certificate request command could allow an authenticated privileged user to execute arbitrary code via specially crafted CLI commands.This issue affects Fireware OS: fr…

item.title: CVE-2025-1910 · 6.3 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL Local Privilege Escalation via Update Package
item.description: The WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL Client on Windows allows a locally authenticated non-administrative Windows user to escalate their privileges to NT AUTHORITY/SYSTEM on the Windows machine where the VPN Client is installed.This issue affects the Mo…

item.title: CVE-2025-6946 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in IPS Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS allows Stored XSS via the IPS module. This vulnerability requires an authenticated administrator session to a locally…

item.title: CVE-2025-1545 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox XPath Injection Vulnerability in Web CGI
item.description: An XPath Injection vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to retrieve sensitive information from the Firebox configuration through an exposed authentication or management web interface. This vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2025-11838 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox iked Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: A memory corruption vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow an unauthenticated attacker to trigger a Denial of Service (DoS) condition in the Mobile User VPN with IKEv2 and the Branch Office VPN using IKEv2 when configured with a dynamic ga…

item.title: CVE-2025-13940 · 6.7 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Boot Time System Integrity Check Bypass
item.description: An Expected Behavior Violation [CWE-440] vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow an attacker to bypass the Fireware OS boot time system integrity check and prevent the Firebox from shutting down in the event of a system integrity check fail…

item.title: CVE-2025-13939 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Gateway Wireless Controller
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS (Gateway Wireless Controller module) allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Fireware OS 11.7.2 up to and including 11.12…

item.title: CVE-2025-13938 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Autotask Technology Integration Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS (Autotask Technology Integration module) allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Fireware OS 12.4 up to and including 12.…

item.title: CVE-2025-13937 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in ConnectWise Technology Integration Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS (ConnectWise Technology Integration module) allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Fireware OS 12.4 up to and including…

item.title: CVE-2025-13936 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Tigerpaw Technology Integration Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS (Tigerpaw Technology Integration module) allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Fireware OS 12.4 up to and including 12.…

item.title: CVE-2025-12196 · 8.6 HIGH — WatchGuard Firebox Authenticated Out of Bounds Write in Management CLI Ping Command
item.description: An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS's CLI could allow an authenticated privileged user to execute arbitrary code via a specially crafted CLI command.This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 12.0 up to and including 12.11.4, 1…

item.title: CVE-2025-12195 · 8.6 HIGH — WatchGuard Firebox Authenticated Out of Bounds Write in Management CLI IPSec Configuration
item.description: An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS's CLI could allow an authenticated privileged user to execute arbitrary code via specially crafted IPSec configuration CLI commands.This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 11.0 up to and i…

item.title: CVE-2025-12026 · 8.6 HIGH — WatchGuard Firebox Authenticated Out of Bounds Write in certd
item.description: An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS’s certificate request command could allow an authenticated privileged user to execute arbitrary code via specially crafted CLI commands.This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 12.0 up to a…

item.title: CVE-2025-1549 · 6.3 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL Local Privilege Escallation
item.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability in the WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL client on Windows enables a local user to execute arbitrary commands with elevated privileges on the Windows system. This vulnerability is an additional unmitigated atta…

item.title: CVE-2025-4106 · 8.9 HIGH — WatchGuard Firebox leftover debug code vulnerability
item.description: An authenticated admin user with access to both the management WebUI and command line interface on a Firebox can enable a diagnostic debug shell by uploading a platform and version-specific diagnostic package and executing a leftover diagnostic comma…

item.title: CVE-2025-9242 · 9.3 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox iked Out of Bounds Write Vulnerability
item.description: An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code. This vulnerability affects both the Mobile User VPN with IKEv2 and the Branch Office VPN using IKEv2 when configured…

item.title: CVE-2025-6947 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in SIP Proxy Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS allows Stored XSS via the SIP Proxy module. This vulnerability requires an authenticated administrator session to a lo…

item.title: CVE-2025-6999 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox Authentication Portal Request Smuggling Vulnerability
item.description: An HTTP Request Smuggling [CWE-444] vulnerability in the Authentication portal of WatchGuard Fireware OS allows a remote attacker to evade request parameter sanitation and perform a reflected self-Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attack.This issue affects…

item.title: CVE-2025-4805 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Acces Portal Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS allows Stored XSS. This vulnerability requires an authenticated administrator session to a locally managed Firebox. Th…

item.title: CVE-2025-4804 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Hotpot Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS allows Stored XSS via the spamBlocker module. This vulnerability requires an authenticated administrator session to a…

item.title: CVE-2025-2782 · 6.3 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Terminal Services Agent Local Privilege Escalation via Non-Standard Installation Directory
item.description: The WatchGuard Terminal Services Agent on Windows does not properly configure directory permissions when installed in a non-default directory. This could allow an authenticated local attacker to escalate to SYSTEM privileges on a vulnerable system. T…

item.title: CVE-2025-2781 · 6.3 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL Local Privilege Escalation via Non-Standard Installation Directory
item.description: The WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL Client on Windows does not properly configure directory permissions when installed in a non-default directory. This could allow an authenticated local attacker to escalate to SYSTEM privileges on a vulnerable system…

item.title: CVE-2025-0178 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WatchGaurd Firebox Host Header Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS allows an attacker to manipulate the value of the HTTP Host header in requests sent to the Web UI. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to redirect users to malicious websites,…

item.title: CVE-2025-1239 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in Blocked Sites List
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS allows Stored XSS via the Blocked Sites list. This vulnerability requires an authenticated administrator session to a…

item.title: CVE-2025-1071 · 4.8 MEDIUM — WatchGuard Firebox Stored Cross-Site-Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability in spamBlocker Module
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS allows Stored XSS via the spamBlocker module. This vulnerability requires an authenticated administrator session to a…

item.title: CVE-2024-8424 · 7.8 HIGH — WatchGuard Endpoint Protection Privilege Escalation in PSANHost Enables Arbitrary File Delete as SYSTEM
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in WatchGuard EPDR, Panda AD360 and Panda Dome on Windows (PSANHost.exe module) allows arbitrary file delete with SYSTEM permissions. This issue affects EPDR: before 8.00.23.0000; Panda AD360: before 8.00.2…

item.title: CVE-2024-6594 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox Single Sign-On Client Denial-of-Service
item.description: Improper Handling of Exceptional Conditions vulnerability in the WatchGuard Single Sign-On Client on Windows causes the client to crash while handling malformed commands. An attacker with network access to the client could create a denial of service…

item.title: CVE-2024-6593 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox Single Sign-On Agent Management Interface Authentication Bypass
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in WatchGuard Authentication Gateway (aka Single Sign-On Agent) on Windows allows an attacker with network access to execute restricted management commands. This issue affects Authentication Gateway: through 12.1…

item.title: CVE-2024-6592 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WatchGuard Firebox Single Sign-On Agent Protocol Authorization Bypass
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in the protocol communication between the WatchGuard Authentication Gateway (aka Single Sign-On Agent) on Windows and the WatchGuard Single Sign-On Client on Windows and MacOS allows Authentication Bypass.This is…

item.title: CVE-2024-5974 · 7.2 HIGH — Firebox Authenticated Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: A buffer overflow in WatchGuard Fireware OS could may allow an authenticated remote attacker with privileged management access to execute arbitrary code with system privileges on the firewall. This issue affects Fireware OS: from 11.9.6 through 12.10…

item.title: CVE-2024-4944 · 7.8 HIGH — Mobile VPN with SSL Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: A local privilege escalation vlnerability in the WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL client on Windows enables a local user to execute arbitrary commands with elevated privileged.

item.title: CVE-2024-1417 · 7.8 HIGH — Local Code Injection Vulnerability in AuthPoint Password Manager App for macOS Safari
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') vulnerability in WatchGuard AuthPoint Password Manager on MacOS allows an a adversary with local access to execute code under the context of the AuthPoint Password Ma…
